event_context.description: Same Houston urban AOI during a pre-Beryl control period. This sample is intended as a no-flood comparison against the Hurricane Beryl flood-impact sample.
source_notes: Control sample selected before the Hurricane Beryl event window, using the same Houston AOI.

historical_risk.label: High
historical_risk.source: Same Houston urban Gulf Coast flood-exposure context as the Hurricane Beryl sample, but during a no-detected-flood control period.
